Name: LIGHT_BANK
Description: Determines the parameters for light maps.

Fields.Name: Light 0: Horizontal Angle
Fields.Description: The horizontal angle to use for this light source. In degrees.

Fields.Name: Light 0: Vertical Angle
Fields.Description: The vertical angle to use for this light source. In degrees.

Fields.Name: Light 0: R
Fields.Description: The red component of the RGBA color used for this light source.

Fields.Name: Light 0: G
Fields.Description: The green component of the RGBA color used for this light source.

Fields.Name: Light 0: B
Fields.Description: The blue component of the RGBA color used for this light source.

Fields.Name: Light 0: Alpha
Fields.Description: The alpha component of the RGBA color used for this light source.
